series_metadata.series_title: LOCAL TAX INCENTIVE AND ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AGREEMENTS AND CERTIFICATIONS
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to tax incentive and economic development agreements administered by municipal and county governments, including, but not limited to, petitions and supporting documentation, agreements, amendments, confirmation certificate or letter of denial, annual reports, and other records related to and filed with the tax exemption authority certifications and agreements. The Agency is not a party to these agreements.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: period specified electronic format ; Electronic: CERTIFICATION DOCUMENTS AND AGREEMENTS: duration of agreement or certification two years ANNUAL REPORTS: five (5) years. Annual reports compiled by Agency must be reviewed by State Archives prior disposal. SUPPLEMENTAL ITEMS: five (5) years Agency is not a party agreements and supplemental items do not serve document agency''s role. Certification of an area or program is based upon whether it has characteristics set forth in applicable section of Ohio Revised Code. LITIGATION HOLD: Any records subject a litigation hold must be retained hold is lifted by Legal Office, regardless of whether specified retention period has elapsed
